title: Synthetic Development Delta Receipt
task_summary: Added a public-safe validator rule and documentation page for development-delta receipts.
boundaries: Local-only example; no deployment, account action, paid API call, or outreach.
Synthetic changed paths and validation output only.
No secrets, credentials, private traces, or proprietary workspace details.
verification: python3 scripts/validate_receipt.py examples/development-delta-receipt.example.json -> PASS: receipt is valid
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -> OK

development_delta.capability_delta: Receipts can now optionally prove that an agent changed concrete artifacts, improved a capability, and produced observable validation evidence instead of only reporting that work ran.
validation_evidence: python3 scripts/validate_receipt.py examples/development-delta-receipt.example.json -> PASS: receipt is valid
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -> OK
development_delta.next_blocker_or_artifact: Add richer examples or promote the standalone Anti-Slop Harness after maintainer naming and README review.

human_gate.approval_note: Public example is synthetic; maintainer should review before adapting to private workflows.

notes: This is a public-safe development-delta example for Agent Run Receipts. It is inspired by anti-slop gates but does not include private harness internals.
